title: Landmark feature
_note: Canonical manifest of natural/ancient landmarks (Phase 5.3). Per-terrain selection weighting lives in LANDMARK_FEATURE_BIAS (js/gen/terrain-profile.js); these weights are the generic fallback. Values are noun phrases composed into the description (capitalised when sentence-initial; the leading article is stripped for the short list name).

entries.value: the ruin of a colossal statue
